message:
test(runtime): add 23 additional undo/command.rs coverage tests

Cover as_any/as_any_mut roundtrips, default trait methods on
CommandBatch (merge_text, accept_merge, target), cross-type
can_merge rejection, TextReplaceCmd redo, batch execute empty,
CommandError clone/eq, MergeConfig copy, and metadata clone.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
